H300.derivation: from H251 (אָח) and H7837 (שַׁחַר); brother of (the) dawn;

H301.derivation: from H251 (אָח) and H7891 (שִׁיר); brother of (the) singer;

H302.derivation: from H251 (אָח) and H8602 (תָּפֵל); brother of folly;

H303.derivation: from the same root as H2459 (חֶלֶב); fatness (i.e. fertile);

H304.strongs_def: Achlai, the name of an Israelitess and of an Israelite

H305.derivation: or אַחֲלֵי; prob from H253 (אָח) and a variation of H3863 (לוּא);

H307.strongs_def: Achmetha (i.e. Ecbatana), the summer capital of Persia

H309.strongs_def: to loiter (i.e. be behind); by implication to procrastinate
H309.kjv_def: continue, defer, delay, hinder, be late (slack), stay (there), tarry (longer).
H309.usage: tarry(7x), defer(3x), slack(2x), continue(1x), delay(1x), hinder(1x)

H310.strongs_def: properly, the hind part; generally used as an adverb or conjunction, after (in various senses)
H310.kjv_def: after (that, -ward), again, at, away from, back (from, -side), behind, beside, by, follow (after, -ing), forasmuch, from, hereafter, hinder end, [phrase] out (over) live, [phrase] persecute, posterity, pursuing, remnant, seeing, since, thence(-forth), when, with.

H312.strongs_def: properly, hinder; generally, next, other, etc.
H312.usage: another(55x), next(2x), following(1x), man's(1x), men(1x), strange(1x)

H314.strongs_def: hinder; generally, late or last; specifically (as facing the east) western
H314.kjv_def: after (-ward), to come, following, hind(-er, -ermost, -most), last, latter, rereward, ut(ter) most.
H314.usage: last(20x), latter(6x), end(2x), utmost(2x), following(1x), hinder(1x), hindermost(1x), hindmost(1x), rereward(1x), uttermost(1x)

H315.derivation: from H310 (אַחַר) and H251 (אָח); after (his) brother;

H316.derivation: from H310 (אַחַר) and H2426 (חֵיל); behind (the) intrenchment (i.e. safe);

H319.strongs_def: the last or end, hence, the future; also posterity
H319.kjv_def: (last, latter) end (time), hinder (utter) -most, length, posterity, remnant, residue, reward.
H319.usage: end(31x), latter(12x), last(7x), posterity(3x), reward(2x), hindermost(1x)

H320.derivation: (Aramaic) from H311 (אַחַר); the same as H319 (אַחֲרִית);

H321.derivation: (Aramaic) from H311 (אַחַר); the same as H317 (אׇחֳרִי);

H323.strongs_def: a satrap or governorof amain province (of Persia)

H324.strongs_def: {a satrap or governorof amain province (of Persia)}

H325.strongs_def: Achashverosh (i.e. Ahasuerus or Artaxerxes, but in this case Xerxes), the title (rather than name) of a Persian king

H326.strongs_def: an achastarite (i.e. courier); the designation (rather than name) of an Israelite

H328.derivation: from an unused root perhaps meaning to move softly;
H328.strongs_def: (as a noun) a necromancer (from their soft incantations), (as an adverb) gently

H329.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to pierce or make fast;

H330.derivation: from an unused root (probably meaning to bind);

H331.strongs_def: to close (the lips or ears); by analology to contract (a window by bevelled jambs)

H333.strongs_def: Ater, the name of three Israelites

H334.strongs_def: shut up, i.e. impeded (as to the use of the right hand)

H335.kjv_def: how, what, whence, where, whether, which (way).

H336.derivation: probably identical with H335 (אַי) (through the idea of a query);

H338.derivation: probably identical with H337 (אִי) (through the idea of a doleful sound);
H338.strongs_def: a howler (used only in the plural), i.e. any solitary wild creature

H339.strongs_def: properly, a habitable spot (as desirable); dry land, a coast, an island

H340.strongs_def: to hate (as one of an opposite tribe or party); hence to be hostile

H341.derivation: or (fully) אוֹיֵב; active participle of H340 (אָיַב);

H343.derivation: from the same as H181 (אוּד) (in the sense of bending down);

H345.strongs_def: Ajah, the name of two Israelites

H347.strongs_def: Ijob, the patriarch famous for his patience

H348.derivation: from H336 (אִי)lemma אי missing vowel, corrected to אִי and H2083 (זְבֻל);
H348.strongs_def: Izebel, the wife of king Ahab

H349.derivation: also אֵיכָה ; and אֵיכָכָה ; prolonged from H335 (אַי);

H350.derivation: from H336 (אִי)lemma אי missing vowel, corrected to אִי and H3519 (כָּבוֹד); (there is) no glory, i.e. inglorious;

H351.derivation: probably a variation for H349 (אֵיךְ), but not as an interogative;

H352.strongs_def: properly, strength; hence, anything strong; specifically a chief (politically); also a ram (from his strength); a pilaster (as a strong support); an oak or other strong tree
H352.kjv_def: mighty (man), lintel, oak, post, ram, tree.

H354.derivation: an intensive form of H352 (אַיִל) (in the sense of ram);

H356.derivation: or (shortened) אֵלוֹן ; or אֵילֹן ; from H352 (אַיִל); oak-grove;
H356.strongs_def: Elon, the name of a place in Palestine, and also of one Hittite, two Israelites
H356.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H357.strongs_def: Ajalon, the name of five places in Palestine

H358.derivation: from H356 (אֵילוֹן), H1004 (בַּיִת), and H2603 (חָנַן); oak-grove of (the) house of favor;
H358.strongs_def: Elon of Beth-chanan, a place in Palestine

H359.derivation: or אֵילַת ; from H352 (אַיִל); trees or a grove (i.e. palms);
H359.strongs_def: Eloth or Elath, a place on the Red Sea

H361.derivation: or (shortened) אֵלָם ; or (feminine) אֵלַמָּה ; probably from H352 (אַיִל);
H361.strongs_def: a pillar-space (or colonnade), i.e. a pale (or portico)

H362.strongs_def: Elim, a place in the Desert

H364.derivation: from H352 (אַיִל) and H6290 (פָּארָן); oak of Paran;
H364.strongs_def: El-Paran, a portion of the district of Paran

H366.derivation: from an unused root (meaning to frighten);

H367.derivation: or (shortened) אֵמָה; from the same as H366 (אָיֹם);
H367.strongs_def: fright; concrete, an idol (as a bugbear)
H367.kjv_def: dread, fear, horror, idol, terrible, terror.

H368.strongs_def: Emim, an early Canaanitish (or Maobitish) tribe

H369.derivation: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;
H369.strongs_def: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
H369.kjv_def: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without. Compare H370 (אַיִן).

H370.derivation: probably identical with H369 (אַיִן) in the sense of query (compare H336 (אִי)lemma אי missing vowel, corrected to אִי)
H370.strongs_def: where? (only in connection with prepositional prefix, whence)

H371.derivation: apparently a shortened form of H369 (אַיִן); but (like H370 (אַיִן)) an interrogative;

H372.derivation: from H336 (אִי)lemma אי missing vowel, corrected to אִי and H5828 (עֵזֶר); helpless;

H373.strongs_def: an Iezrite or descendant of Iezer

H374.strongs_def: an ephah or measure for grain; hence, a measure in general

H375.strongs_def: what place?; also (of time) when?; or (of means) how?

H376.derivation: contracted for H582 (אֱנוֹשׁ) (or perhaps rather from an unused root meaning to be extant);
H376.strongs_def: a man as an individual or a male person; often used as an adjunct to a more definite term (and in such cases frequently not expressed in translation)
H376.kjv_def: also, another, any (man), a certain, [phrase] champion, consent, each, every (one), fellow, (foot-, husband-) man, (good-, great, mighty) man, he, high (degree), him (that is), husband, man(-kind), [phrase] none, one, people, person, [phrase] steward, what (man) soever, whoso(-ever), worthy. Compare H802 (אִשָּׁה).

H377.strongs_def: to be a man, i.e. act in amanly way

H378.derivation: from H376 (אִישׁ) and H1322 (בֹּשֶׁת); man of shame;
H378.strongs_def: Ish-Bosheth, a son of King Saul

H379.derivation: from H376 (אִישׁ) and H1935 (הוֹד); man of renown;

H380.strongs_def: the little man of the eye; the pupil or ball; hence, the middle (of night)

H381.derivation: from H376 (אִישׁ) and H2428 (חַיִל); man of might; by defective transcription (2 Samuel 23:20) אִישׁ־חַיxlit ʼÎsh-Chay corrected to ʼÎysh-Chay; as if from H376 (אִישׁ) and H2416 (חַי); living man;

H382.derivation: from H376 (אִישׁ) and H2897 (טוֹב); man of Tob;

H383.strongs_def: properly, entity; used only as aparticle of affirmation, there is
H383.kjv_def: art thou, can, do ye, have, it be, there is (are), [idiom] we will not.

H384.derivation: perhaps from H837 (אֹשֶׁר) and H410 (אֵל); God has arrived;
H384.strongs_def: Ithiel, the name of an Israelite, also of a symbolical person

H385.derivation: from H339 (אִי) and H8558 (תָּמָר); coast of the palm-tree;

H386.derivation: or (shortened) אֵתָן ; from an unused root (meaning to continue);
H386.strongs_def: permanence; hence (concrete) permanent; specifically a chieftain

H387.strongs_def: Ethan, the name of four Israelites

H388.derivation: plural of H386 (אֵיתָן); always with the article; the permanent brooks;
H388.strongs_def: Ethanim, the name of a month

H389.strongs_def: a particle of affirmation, surely; hence (by limitation) only
H389.kjv_def: also, in any wise, at least, but, certainly, even, howbeit, nevertheless, notwithstanding, only, save, surely, of a surety, truly, verily, [phrase] wherefore, yet (but).

H390.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to strengthen; a fortress;

H392.derivation: from H391 (אַכְזָב); deceitful (in the sense of a winter-torrent which fails in summer);
H392.strongs_def: Akzib, the name of two places in Palestine

H393.derivation: from an unused root (apparently meaning to act harshly);
H393.strongs_def: violent; by implication deadly; also (in a good sense) brave

H398.kjv_def: [idiom] at all, burn up, consume, devour(-er, up), dine, eat(-er, up), feed (with), food, [idiom] freely, [idiom] in...wise(-deed, plenty), (lay) meat, [idiom] quite.
